failure_modes.mitigation: adapter reports not_installed; UI stays available
adapter reports hardware_missing; setup gives guidance
adapter reports not_configured; wizard opens relevant profile setup
bounded retries then deferred delivery if allowed
backpressure, drop/defer by priority and audit event
rate limits, TTL/hop controls, duplicate suppression
route policy disallows large files over low-bandwidth adapters
policy gate blocks before adapter send
no blocking calls on UI path; worker queue boundaries
